jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - 91Springboard - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
91Springboard, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 91Springboard:
91Springboard is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 91Springboard!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
